assertions.title: End-to-end jade flow produces all outputs with new fields

steps.expected: 6 files: normalized_samples.json, scored_samples.json, report.json, report.md, report.html, dashboard.json
steps.observed: All 6 files present: dashboard.json (1446B), normalized_samples.json (1813B), report.html (7852B), report.json (2602B), report.md (1264B), scored_samples.json (2272B)

steps.expected: Samples have engagement, creator, media as top-level structured fields
steps.observed: 1 sample with keys [provenance, content, engagement, creator, media]. engagement={likes:10, saves:5, comments:2, shares:1}, creator={id:'creator-001', name:'creator', ...}, media={content_type:'video', image_urls:[...], video_url:'...'}

steps.expected: Samples have engagement, creator, media fields visible
steps.observed: ScoringResult wraps sample under 'sample' key. sample.engagement={likes:10, saves:5, comments:2, shares:1}, sample.creator and sample.media fully populated

steps.expected: Samples have engagement, creator, media as top-level structured fields
steps.observed: Dashboard samples have keys [title, content, tags, engagement, creator, media, score]. engagement={likes:10, saves:5, comments:2, shares:1}, creator and media fully populated as structured objects

assertions.title: End-to-end streetwear flow produces all outputs with new fields

steps.expected: 6 files: normalized_samples.json, scored_samples.json, report.json, report.md, report.html, dashboard.json
steps.observed: All 6 files present: dashboard.json (4342B), normalized_samples.json (6281B), report.html (8552B), report.json (3008B), report.md (1652B), scored_samples.json (7850B)

steps.expected: Samples have engagement, creator, media as top-level structured fields
steps.observed: 3 samples, each with keys [provenance, content, engagement, creator, media]. Sample 0: engagement={likes:320, saves:150, comments:45, shares:28}, creator={id:'creator-sw-001', name:'streetstyle_daily', ...}, media={content_type:'video', ...}

steps.expected: Samples have engagement, creator, media fields visible
steps.observed: 3 ScoringResult entries. Each sample under 'sample' key contains engagement, creator, media. Sample 0: sample.engagement={likes:320, saves:150, comments:45, shares:28}, sample.creator and sample.media fully populated

steps.expected: Samples have engagement, creator, media as top-level structured fields
steps.observed: 3 dashboard samples with keys [title, content, tags, engagement, creator, media, score]. All have structured engagement/creator/media objects

assertions.title: Full test suite passes after all changes

steps.expected: Tests cover adapters, schema, parsing, scoring, dashboard output, reporting, workflows, packaging, and validation
steps.observed: 116 tests across test_adapters.py (6), test_dashboard_output.py (9), test_engagement_scoring.py (9), test_jade_flow.py (6), test_packaging.py (2), test_parsing.py (14), test_prepare_input.py (3), test_projects.py (6), test_reporting.py (18), test_schema.py (8), test_scoring_engine.py (2), test_streetwear_flow.py (10), test_validate_pack.py (13), test_workflows.py (2) — all PASSED

frictions.description: `python` command not found on this system — only `python3` is available. The validation contract specifies `python -m intelligence run-pack` but the actual working command is `python3 -m intelligence run-pack`.
frictions.resolution: Used `python3` instead of `python` for all CLI invocations

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. All 6 output files are generated for both jade and streetwear packs with engagement/creator/media fields visible in normalized, scored, and dashboard outputs. Full test suite (116 tests) passes with 0 failures.
